title: Admin Panel Mobile-First Adaptation
description: Conduct a full audit and adaptation of the admin panel for mobile devices. 1. Implement a mobile navigation menu (Hamburger/Drawer) in `frontend/layouts/admin.vue`. 2. Ensure all admin pages (products, orders, blog, etc.) are responsive. 3. Transform data tables into responsive versions (horizontal scroll or card view). 4. Optimize forms for small screens. 5. Use existing project design tokens from `frontend/assets/css/tokens.css`.
acceptance_criteria: Mobile navigation is functional and accessible on screens < 768px.
All admin list pages use responsive tables or card views on mobile.
Editing forms (products, blog posts) are usable on mobile (min 320px).
UI strictly follows the project's design tokens and theme.
